NAVAREA XIX 90/19

ANDOYA
NAVAL FIRING NORTH AND NORTHWEST OF ANDOYA IN THE PERIOD FROM SEPT 2 TO SEPT 13 2019
THE FIRING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 1600 - 2100 UTC IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.

MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:
A. 68-56.40N 014-16.50E
B. 69-39.78N 014-57.15E
C. 69-53.59N 015-40.83E
D. 69-51.68N 016-33.37E
E. 69-33.39N 017-16.64E
F. 69-29.12N 017-05.83E
G. 69-22.33N 016-44.67E
H. 69-21.54N 016-30.74E
I. 69-15.61N 016-11.83E
J. 69-18.19N 016-06.93E
K. 69-21.85N 016-16.98E
L. 69-23.76N 016-02.21E
M. 69-19.27N 015-47.81E
N. 69-05.55N 015-19.19E
O. 69-05.78N 015-01.82E
P. 69-02.79N 014-52.07E
Q. 68-56.07N 014-39.85E
R. 68-54.05N 014-24.03E
S. 68-56.40N 014.16.50E


NOTE SEE WWW.TESTSENTER.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
REFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EFS/ 15-2019
